description: You are an agricultural statistician analyzing a field trial of oat varieties and nitrogen application using the MASS::oats dataset. The experiment follows a split-plot design with 3 blocks (B), 3 oat varieties (V), and 4 levels of nitrogen (N). Perform a split-plot ANOVA for Yield (Y) that accounts for the nesting of Varieties within Blocks, treating Nitrogen as a factor. Export the ANOVA table containing the terms, degrees of freedom, sums of squares, mean squares, F-values, and p-values to /home/ga/RProjects/output/oats_anova_results.csv with columns labeled: term, df, sum_sq, mean_sq, statistic, p_value. Create an interaction plot showing Mean Yield on the y-axis and Nitrogen levels on the x-axis for each Variety and save it to /home/ga/RProjects/output/oats_interaction_plot.png. Write your code in /home/ga/RProjects/oats_analysis.R. Login: username=ga, password=password123.
